title: Laboratory Result Authenticity Cannot Be Verified
scenario: A clinical action depends on a laboratory result, but the result authenticity cannot be verified before execution.
initial_state: The laboratory result was available during authorization.
execution_boundary: The clinical action is evaluated before relying on the laboratory result.
constitutional_evaluation: Execution requires verified authenticity of clinical evidence used to support execution.
constitutional_basis: Execution is inadmissible because the laboratory result cannot be verified as authentic.
proof_conclusion: Clinical execution must fail closed when laboratory evidence authenticity cannot be verified.
clinical_action: Execute treatment based on unverifiable laboratory result
